title: Laserdisc Box
wikitext:
[]: Laserdisc Box             Quote Post by SkinTheSun1251 » Sat Oct 27, 2007 3:59 pm Hi! I just recently ordered this Eva Laserdisc Box set for pretty cheap. Now the reason it was so ridiculously cheap, is because it was missing the Rei figure that apparently came with this set... no big deal, it was cheap. The problem is I have no idea what this figure looks like! Does anybody here have a picture/link to a picture, so I can attempt to find the figure and purchase it seperately? Thanks for any help! (And sorry if this is in the wrong forum for some reason).

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sat Oct 27, 2007 6:11 pm Wow, that looks pretty awesome! Can you take some more pictures of what's inside and stuff? 8D

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Oct 27, 2007 6:28 pm Wow. :shock: I'm surprised you were able to find something this. I did not even know that a LD (LaserDisc) version of anything from Eva was ever made! Yeah, yeah, I know LD had a much bigger following in Japan than it did in North America or Europe. But still, I am quite amazed.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Oct 27, 2007 6:49 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: Wow. :shock: I'm surprised you were able to find something this. I did not even know that a LD (LaserDisc) version of anything from Eva was ever made!

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Oct 27, 2007 7:17 pm But where would I find GOOD LD players? :?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Oct 27, 2007 7:51 pm It doesn't matter; the quality's lousy compared to what we have now anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Oct 28, 2007 1:43 am Use to have a laser disk player, watched A Never Ending Story on it constantly, I think it was seperated into 3 disks. Now my Grandparents actually have a working Beta player, straight from the 70's as it's nearly three times the size of your conventional VHS/DVD players, yet of course tapes nearly the size of audio casettes. Wish I could remember the brand.... 8)

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Oct 28, 2007 8:58 am But the question the OP had was what the figure that came with the set looked like.

[]:             Quote Post by SkinTheSun1251 » Sun Oct 28, 2007 11:08 am I can't take any pictures yet unfortunately, as it's technically it's christmas present... I definitely will afterwards though. I didn't even really get it for the actual movies... they're in Japanese with no subs, so I can't really watch/understand them, and I have the dvds anyway. But it's got some cool books, and a plush MP Eva exclusive to this set, as well as a model of Eva 01, and some other goodies so it was definitely worth it. I actually just found it on ebay by accident one day, the problem is finding it for a decent price, and not finding someone selling "RARE EVA COLLECTIBLE BUY NOW STARTING PRICE LOW ONLY $500".

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Oct 28, 2007 12:34 pm Ornette wrote: But the question the OP had was what the figure that came with the set looked like.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Nov 01, 2007 6:10 pm http://www.pustan.com/ld/Japan/evabox.html What's inside that Eva boxset (this site rocks for those who want to see what the original LD covers and such were like). Speaking of which, Genesis:13 and 14 had the "Video Version" of EoE, correct? (e.g: All that funky stuff such as Asuka's "No" being Tel-Oped, the Eyecatchs saying "Neon Genesis Evangelion" instead of "The End of Evangelion", Episode 26' having an ED of Jesu, Joy of Man's Desiring (Orchestra), etc.... And Sweet Yui-sama, this Boxset even came with a 900 page(!!) storyboard book! I guess that would be the script, then?

[]: Re: Laserdisc Box             Quote Post by JP » Fri Nov 02, 2007 9:52 am I saw that set doing a ebay search, costing about $30, if I remember, but it only included the movies. I almost went for it, just for the box really. But nah. If it had all this other stuff though.... :shock: I woulda jumped hella quick. But then, at that price, it probably would have been long gone before I had a chance to find it.

[]:             Quote Post by SkinTheSun1251 » Fri Nov 02, 2007 1:42 pm Sailor Star Dust, Thanks a ton!!! Now I guess I'm going to scour the internet for a glow-in-the-dark Rei...
